请输入角色名称搜索: Please enter a role name to search for
自动转交人至少需要包含一位当前操作人之外的用户，否则截止规则设置失效: The automatic handover person must include at least one user other than the current operator, otherwise the deadline rule setting will become invalid
工作流启用失败,审批节点配置异常: 选择的视图无效: Workflow activation failed, approval node configuration exception: the selected view is invalid
删除节点后，所有相关节点配置都将被重置，需要重新配置这些节点。请确认要执行此操作: After deleting nodes, all related node configurations will be reset and these nodes need to be reconfigured. Please confirm to perform this operation
不能小于起始日期(含偏移量): Cannot be less than the start date (including offset)
当前节点,数据可能已变更未保存: Current node, data may have changed but not saved
选择日期字段时,需要指定触发的时刻: When selecting the date field, it is necessary to specify the triggering time
配置流程参数，作为临时字段，可以存放某个字段值，或计算结果，或接收其他流程中传过: Configure process parameters as temporary fields that can store a certain field value, calculate results, or receive values passed from other processes
审批节点配置异常：选择的视图无效: Workflow activation failed, approval node configuration exception: Invalid view selected Approval node configuration exception: Invalid view selected
未获取数据时处理: Process when data is not obtained
输入通知收件人手机号，回车保存: Enter the notification recipient's phone number and press Enter to save
可更新数据源可选节点计算: Optional node calculation for updatable data sources
根据节点内容生成描述: Generate description based on node content
子流程可更新数据源可选节点计算: Sub process updatable data source optional node calculation
审批可退回,可选数据源 等等: Approval can be returned, optional data sources, etc
在分支下新增or删除第一个节点时,指定分支所在的坐标. 不指定认为在分支的汇合节: When adding or deleting the first node under a branch, specify the coordinates where the branch is located Do not specify adding nodes after the merging node of the branch
参数名称规则：参数名称必须以字母开头，支持输入数字和下划线，不支持输入汉字: Parameter name rule: Parameter names must start with a letter, support inputting numbers and underscores, and do not support inputting Chinese characters
复制需要通知的时间或群聊机器人的rul地址，如：钉钉可在钉钉群设置中的机器人管理: Copy the required notification time or the URL address of the group chat robot. For example, in the robot management section of the nail group settings, add a robot and copy the corresponding Webhook address.
多人审批时的审批方式: Approval method when multiple people approve
工作流触发方式配置异常: Abnormal configuration of workflow triggering method
填写操作提交后执行函数: Execute the function after submitting the fill in operation
节点配置异常时发布报错。工作流启用失败,审批节点配置异常: 选择的视图无效: Publish an error when the node configuration is abnormal. Workflow activation failed, approval node configuration exception: the selected view is invalid
当前节点与上一节点人重复时，默认同意: When the current node is duplicated with the previous node, it is agreed by default
失败 , 流程发布失败, 审批节点配置异常: 未选择审批模型: Fail , Process publishing failed, approval node configuration exception: no approval model selected
输入通知收件人邮箱，回车保存: Enter the notification recipient's email and press Enter to save
配置流程参数，作为临时字段，可以存放某个字段值，或计算结果，或接收其他流程中传过: Configure process parameters as temporary fields that can store a certain field value, calculate results, or receive values passed from other processes;
仅满足以下条件的进入流程: Entry process that only meets the following conditions
关联父流程的子流程节点id: Associate the sub process node ID of the parent process
待更新的下个节点信息,不允许修改节点id,只允许修改表达式,名称等等: The information of the next node to be updated is not allowed to modify the node ID, only the expression, name, and so on
流程设计保存时，提示更新成功未翻译: When saving the process design, prompt for successful update but not translated
修改流程所属应用后新触发流程变更，旧数据所属应用仍然保持不变: After modifying the application to which the process belongs, a new process change is triggered, and the application to which the old data belongs remains unchanged
在分支节点的情况下,下一个节点是汇合节点: In the case of branch nodes, the next node is the convergence node
请输入1-500之间的整数: Please enter an integer between 1 and 500
工作流启用失败,未配置请求方式: Workflow activation failed, request method not configured
请填写小时数: Please fill in the number of hours
仅保证在一个流程中唯一: Only guarantee uniqueness within one process
如：钉钉群机器人管理中勾选加签，复制对应的密钥: For example, in the management of nail group robots, check 'add signature' and copy the corresponding key
审批操作提交后执行函数: Execute function after submitting approval operation
确定删除吗？: Are you sure to delete it?
当前节点与历史节点人重复，默认同意: The current node is duplicated with the historical node person, and the default consent is given
失败,未处理的系统异常, 当前工作流无参数定义，不允许设置参数: Fail,Unhandled system exception, current workflow has no parameter definition and parameter setting is not allowed
被拷贝的流程定义id: The ID of the copied process definition
当前节点与发起人重复时，默认同意: When the current node is duplicated with the initiator, it is agreed by default
新增or重置为1,标记节点业务数据都为空: Added or reset to 1, marked node business data is empty
审批即将截止，请您尽快处理: Approval is about to expire, please handle it as soon as possible
数据源节点变化,导致引用节点重置: The data source node changes, causing the reference node to reset
待办操作提交后执行函数: Execute function after to-do operation is submitted
删除节点后，同时删除分支下所有节点，请确认执行此操作: After deleting the node, all nodes under the branch will also be deleted. Please confirm to proceed with this action.
(新增的数据仅用做后续流程中的其他节点使用): (Newly added data is only used by other nodes in subsequent workflows)
向上1级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up 1 Level Department
向上2级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up 2 Levels Department
向上3级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up 3 Levels Department
向上4级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up 4 Levels Department
向上5级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up 5 Levels Department
向上6级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up 6 Levels Department
向上第1级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up to 1st Level Department
向上第2级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up to 2nd Level Department
向上第3级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up to 3rd Level Department
向上第4级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up to 4th Level Department
向上第5级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up to 5th Level Department
向上第6级部门内所有主管: All Managers in Up to 6th Level Department
填写即将截止，请您尽快处理: Filling deadline is approaching, please process ASAP
子微流和后续的节点同时进行: Sub-Microflow runs concurrently with subsequent nodes
子微流执行完毕后，再开始下一节点: Start next node after Sub-Microflow finishes
当数据来源模型与动态表单函数所属模型不一致时，当前节点作为数据源: When data source model differs from dynamic form function model, use current node as data source
当某人在不同类型人员在选择时被重复选中，只会收到一次审批的待办。: When a person is repeatedly selected in different types, only one approval todo is received.
手机号格式错误，请检查: Mobile number format is incorrect, please check
未获取到数据时执行方式: Execution Method When No Data Fetched
短信将发送至员工所绑定的手机号，若该员工未绑定手机号，将从用户中心获取。: SMS will be sent to the employee's bound mobile. If none bound, will fetch from user center.
触发时根据消息标识触发，如果存在两个相同的消息标识，那么这两个数据流程都会触发。: Trigger based on message identifier. If two identical identifiers exist, both data flows will trigger.
请选择需要审批流程的部门: Please select department requiring approval workflow
邮箱格式错误，请检查: Email format is incorrect, please check
流程结束后，最后一个人工节点的反悔期限，超过该时长后将不允许反悔: After workflow ends, the retract deadline for the last manual node. No retract allowed after this duration.
服务器正忙，请稍后再试: Server is busy, please try again later
